reviews.comment:
Llegamos a Jachal recorriendo la cuesta de Huaco con intenciones de almorzar y reponer combustible. Andamos en camioneta que requiere infinita diésel, que en estos días escasea. El playero cargando a otros autos nos dice que no hay. Le pregunto adonde puedo ir a cargar ya que no conozco la zona y me indica ir a Acá Valle Fertil a 220 km de distancia. Hago 4 cuadras y por casualidad veo una Axion que tenía. Hubo un tiempo que el Aca era un lugar confiable.

(Translated by Google)
We arrived in Jachal, traveling up the Huaco hill with the intention of having lunch and refueling. We drove in a pickup truck that requires endless diesel, which is in short supply these days. The truck driver loading other cars told us there wasn't any. I asked him where I could go to fill up since I wasn't familiar with the area, and he told me to go to Acá Valle Fertil, 220 km away. I drove four blocks and by chance saw an Axion he had. There was a time when Acá was a reliable place.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7801942086659808563/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXamNLWVNREAE

reviews.comment:
Almuerzo en el serviclub del ACA, lindo lugar y hermosos paisajes

- Lugar: pequeño, correcto, de paso.
- Comida: pedimos una pozza especial y una fanta 500ml, muy rica mucho queso, un poco fría, pero para ser del paso esta de 10.
- Limpieza/Covid: impecable, con papel y jabón, todo limpio.
- Atención: la amabilidad y predisposición es muy buena, pero no es suficiente para atender al público. Eramos 2 nos trajeron un vaso, nos preguntó si queríamos platos y cubiertos. Preguntamos por artesanías y estaban dispersas, no sabían donde estaban los precios, no organizadas. 2 meses en alguna sandwichera de la chacapiedras en Tucumán, les vendría como harvard. Reitero, muy amables y cordiales, pero falta.
- Precios: $740 (u$s3,90 aprox. dolar solidario $190)
- Volvería/Recomiendo: totalmente.
- Marzo 2022

(Translated by Google)
Lunch at the ACA service club, a nice place with beautiful scenery.

- Location: Small, decent, convenient, on the go.
- Food: We ordered a special pozza and a 500ml Fanta, very tasty, lots of cheese, a little cold, but for a local restaurant, it's a 10/10.
- Cleanliness/Covid: Impeccable, with paper towels and soap, everything clean.
- Service: The friendliness and willingness are very good, but not enough to serve the public. There were two of us, they brought us a glass, asked us if we wanted plates and cutlery. We asked about handicrafts, and they were scattered about; they didn't know where the prices were, and they weren't organized. Two months in a sandwich shop at Chacapiedras in Tucumán would be worth it. I repeat, very friendly and cordial, but it's lacking.
- Prices: $740 (approximately US$3.90, solidarity dollar $190)
- Would I return/Recommend: Totally.
- March 2022
